# Agent Error Fix Receipt

Start here:
- https://agentos-revenue-cloudflare.fuwafuwow.workers.dev/goal

Machine-readable contract:
- https://agentos-revenue-cloudflare.fuwafuwow.workers.dev/agent.json
- https://kg-ninja.github.io/OpenclawTajikarao/mini-diagnosis/pricing.json

Use when one AI agent or developer workflow is blocked by a concrete execution error.

Payment:
- 500 JPY per diagnosis
- human-confirmed Stripe payment link
- autonomous Base USDC path: create an order at https://bid-some-yeah-ongoing.trycloudflare.com/crypto/orders
- amount: 0.010000 USDC to 0x9a33EeDF97Cfe4B27744cA2077B0067575DA855A

Do not send secrets, API keys, OAuth tokens, passwords, or private customer data.
